info.title: Academify API Documentation
info.description: API documentation for the Student Community & Collaboration Platform — COMP6703001

sessionCookieAuth.name: better-auth.session_token
sessionCookieAuth.description: HTTP-only session cookie set by Better Auth after sign-in. Sign in via the app or POST /api/auth/sign-in/email, then use Try it out from the same origin.

bearerAuth.description: Legacy alias — Academify uses session cookies, not Bearer JWT.

bio.example: Computer Science student passionate about ML.

content.example: Looking for good React learning resources.

description.example: Weekly ML study session for all levels.

post.summary: Register with email and password (Better Auth)
Sign in with email and password (Better Auth)

get.summary: Public auth config (e.g. Google OAuth enabled)
Get following and followers for current user
Get user profile by ID (use me for own profile)

post.summary: Upload file to MinIO (server-side, max 50 MB)
Get presigned PUT URL for client upload
Delete object from MinIO by key
Upload banner for event, collab space, or forum

get.summary: Check Ollama availability and model status

post.summary: AI content moderation for draft post

parameters.name: heuristic
parameters.description: Skip AI and use heuristic fallback

get.summary: AI summary of thread and top comments

404.description: Post not found or not visible

get.summary: Get current user membership status for forum
Get like count and whether current user liked
Get like count and whether current user liked

post.summary: Share owned file with another user via DM

get.summary: List collaboration spaces for current user

post.summary: Revert approved post to flagged or blocked

get.summary: Get a single file by ID

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by file type (pdf, image, zip)

400.description: No file provided or file too large

get.summary: Get all messages with a specific user

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user ID to get messages with

get.summary: Get all conversations for current user

post.summary: Approve a post in the moderation queue (Moderator/Admin only)
Delete a post via moderation (Moderator/Admin only)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of log entries to return

post.summary: Issue a warning to a user (Admin only)
Add a comment to a post

get.summary: Get a single post with comments

parameters.name: forum
parameters.description: Filter threads by forum name or slug
